summary: Comprehensive testing of BETRADARMUS platform - Fixed critical bug in Value Alert Service (MongoDB truth value testing), tested all Admin Dashboard tabs (Übersicht, KI Generator, Signale, Polymarket, Value Alerts, Telegram Nutzer, Website Nutzer, Registrierungen, Zahlungen), verified all backend APIs. All 29 backend tests pass. All frontend E2E tests pass.

fixed.issue: MongoDB database objects do not implement truth value testing - 'if not self.db' caused errors
fixed.fix: Changed all 'if not self.db' to 'if self.db is None' and 'if db and' to 'if db is not None and'

critical_code_review_comments: Value Alert Service had incorrect boolean checks for MongoDB database objects - fixed
Admin credentials in conftest.py were outdated - updated to use test_admin@betradarmus.de
seed_data_creation: Created test_admin@betradarmus.de with elite subscription for testing admin dashboard functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests passing. Fixed critical bug in value_alert_service.py where MongoDB database objects were incorrectly checked with 'if not self.db' instead of 'if self.db is None'. Admin Dashboard tabs all working: Übersicht, KI Generator, Signale, Polymarket, Value Alerts, Telegram Nutzer, Website Nutzer, Registrierungen, Zahlungen. Polymarket API integration working (fetches real data from Polymarket). Value Alerts API working (scan, get, stats endpoints). Test admin user: test_admin@betradarmus.de / TestAdmin123!
features_tested: Admin Dashboard accessible for Elite users
Admin Dashboard tabs switch correctly (all 9 tabs)
Polymarket Tab shows Events and Value Calculator
Value Alerts Tab shows Scan button and Alerts list

mocked_apis.notes: The Odds API may return simulation data when quota is exhausted, but Polymarket API returns real data
